title: 150 Military Whistleblowers Reported UFOs at Nuclear Sites!
summary: This interview excerpt discusses Robert Hastings' research interviewing over 150 military personnel who reported UFO incidents at nuclear facilities. The claims center on UFOs appearing at nuclear missile sites, weapon storage areas, and test sites, including incidents where UFOs allegedly shut down missile silos in Montana.

acronyms.definition: A program requiring military personnel working with nuclear weapons to meet strict mental health and substance use standards, including reporting even minor medications like ibuprofen

key_claims.claim: Robert Hastings has personally interviewed more than 120 former or retired military personnel who report UFO incidents at nuclear sites
UFO incidents were reported at nuclear missile sites, nuclear weapon storage areas, and nuclear weapons test sites in Nevada and the Pacific
A UFO shut down several missile silos in Montana
Personnel working at nuclear sites must be on the Personal Reliability Program and must report even taking ibuprofen
